LanguageData.VoidMonolith.label: Big MT antenna
LanguageData.HarbingerTree.label: spore plant
LanguageData.GoldenCube.label: toaster
LanguageData.Deathpall.label: FEV aerosol cloud
LanguageData.Deathpall.description: An airborne release of aerosolized FEV â€” Forced Evolutionary Virus â€” from a ruptured Big MT containment breach. The nanoscale viral particles settle into dead tissue and begin forced reanimation, creating lobotomites from any available corpses. Wearing sealed respirators provides some protection.
LanguageData.TwistedObelisk.label: West Tek mutagenic emitter
LanguageData.CorruptedObelisk.label: malfunctioning ZAX node
LanguageData.WarpedObelisk.label: Big MT field projector
LanguageData.PitGate.label: service tunnel
LanguageData.VoidStructure.label: Think Tank installation
LanguageData.VoidNode.label: broadcast node
LanguageData.UnnaturalCorpse.label: test subject remains
LanguageData.FleshmassHeart.label: FEV reactor
LanguageData.Noctolith.label: FEV containment pod
LanguageData.BloodRain.label: FEV rain
LanguageData.BloodRain.description: A precipitation event caused by atmospheric dispersal of diluted Forced Evolutionary Virus from a high-altitude Big MT drone. The FEV is too thin to cause full mutation but triggers extreme aggression and adrenal overdrive in anyone it contacts. Anyone exposed will enter a berserk rage.
LanguageData.Gorehulk.label: behemoth
LanguageData.Revenant.label: nightkin
LanguageData.Metalhorror.label: trauma harness
LanguageData.Sightstealer.label: roboscorpion
LanguageData.Noctol.label: nightstalker
LanguageData.Devourer.label: centaur
LanguageData.Chimera.label: FEV hybrid
LanguageData.Nociosphere.label: Think Tank brain
LanguageData.Fleshbeasts.label: FEV beast
LanguageData.Fleshbeasts.description: Creatures produced by runaway Forced Evolutionary Virus exposure in Big MT containment vats. FEV beasts are masses of cancerous, rapidly dividing flesh organized by a distributed nervous system. Some specimens contain multiple redundant neural cores, allowing them to split into smaller beasts on death. They are directed at a high level by a ZAX unit.
LanguageData.FleshmassNucleus.label: ZAX unit
LanguageData.Dreadmeld.label: FEV amalgam
LanguageData.Shambler.label: lobotomite
LanguageData.Shambler.description: Corpses or surgically brain-absent subjects reanimated by the Big MT broadcast signal and residual FEV activity. Lobotomites are slow, relentless, and mindless. They will continue attacking until their body reaches metabolic failure. Unlike true undead, they can theoretically be captured and studied â€” although what's left to study is largely mechanical.
LanguageData.Ghoul.label: robobrain subject
LanguageData.Ghoul.description: A person implanted with a Big MT neural override chip. The chip has malfunctioned and is sending constant high-frequency commands the host cannot resist, turning them into a spasmodic killing machine. They remain biologically alive. They cannot be reasoned with while the chip is active.
